Name: Product Catalog Modeling
Description: Define products, variants, SKUs, attributes and inventory mapping to Shopify
Acceptance Criteria: Products in Shopify reflect variants and inventory

Name: Product Grid UI
Description: Responsive product listing with filters and quick add-to-cart
Acceptance Criteria: Responsive grid, filtering works, add-to-cart adds item to cart

Name: Checkout Integration
Description: Integrate headless flow with Shopify Checkout or Storefront API
Acceptance Criteria: Checkout completes and creates Shopify order idempotently
